lexicon.subtitle: Shared glossary of trading terms and their definitions.

login.title: PortfolioAI
login.tagline: Market analysis that reads like a story, not a buy signal.
login.disclaimer: ⚠️ This is not licensed financial advice. For educational use only.

indicators.title: Computed indicators
indicators.description: RSI, momentum, moving averages, drawdown — crunched server-side, never hallucinated by the AI.

narrative.title: AI narration
narrative.description: A short read that digests the indicators and recent context. The AI writes, it doesn't decide.

portfolio.title: Connected portfolio
portfolio.description: Wealthsimple CSV import, historical snapshots, cross-position takes.

errors.notAuthorized: This account is not authorised to access PortfolioAI. Contact the administrator if you think this is a mistake.
errors.oauthFailed: Google sign-in failed. Try again or contact the administrator if the issue persists.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.subtitle: The backend returned an unexpected response. You can sign out to start clean, or go back to the login page and try again.

dashboard.title: PortfolioAI
dashboard.disclaimer: ⚠️ This is not licensed financial advice. Educational use only.
dashboard.noPortfolios: Import a CSV to create your portfolios.
dashboard.noAssets: No positions — import a CSV to populate this portfolio.

errors.invalid: Ticker not recognised by the market provider. Pick a suggestion.

dashboard.emptySelection: Select a portfolio or import a CSV to start.

ticker.noChart: Not enough data to draw the curve.

zoom.resetTooltip: Restore the full timeframe (or double-click the chart)

options.sector: Auto-detect the SPDR sector ETF for this ticker

errors.fetch: Benchmark data unavailable — try another or check your market provider plan.
errors.sectorNotMapped: No sector benchmark available for this ticker.

errors.rateLimit: Market data temporarily unavailable. Try again in a few minutes.

narrative.title: AI Narrative
narrative.empty: No narrative for this ticker yet. Click "Generate narrative" to get a reading of the indicators above.
narrative.errorReload: Narrative generated but couldn't be reloaded

watchlist.addAria: Add this ticker to the watchlist
watchlist.removeAria: Remove this ticker from the watchlist

news.title: News
news.empty: No recent news for this ticker.
news.noSummary: No summary available — open the article for the full text.

analyst.title: Analyst recommendations
analyst.notCovered: No analyst is currently covering this ticker.

trend.flat: Stable recommendations over the last 6 months

earnings.title: Earnings
earnings.notCovered: No earnings data available for this ticker.

import.title: Sync from Wealthsimple
import.intro: Import your CSV positions export. A portfolio will be created or updated for each account, and a snapshot will be saved for historical tracking.

errors.preview: Couldn't read the file. Check that it's a Wealthsimple positions export.

suivi.title: Portfolio tracking
suivi.intro: History of CSV imports — each import creates a dated snapshot of your positions.
suivi.empty: No history yet. Import a CSV to start tracking.
suivi.loadError: Couldn't load the history. Please retry.

lexiconPage.title: Lexicon
lexiconPage.description: Admin-only — manage the shared trading glossary (add, edit, delete terms). The read-only view is available to everyone under « Lexicon » in the main navigation.

statsImportPage.title: Stats import
statsImportPage.description: Admin-only — push the trade-stats dataset (generated by scripts/stats) into the database via CSV, or export the whole table back out.

export.title: Export
export.subtitle: Download the whole table
export.description: Download every stat row as a CSV, in the exact same layout as the import.

format.encoding: UTF-8 with BOM, RFC 4180 — opens cleanly in Excel.
format.columns: 14 columns — identical to the import (computed %push / %LOD / %EOD omitted).
format.roundtrip: Roundtrip-safe — the exported file re-imports as-is.

import.title: Import
import.subtitle: Inject the stats CSV
import.description: Drop the stats-data-prod.csv produced by scripts/stats (or any file with the same column layout). Atomic batch — if any row is invalid, nothing is persisted and you get a per-line error report below.

format.source: Generated by scripts/stats from the trade-stats sheet.
format.atomic: Atomic batch — one bad row rejects the whole file.

import.failed: {{ count }} error(s) found — nothing was imported.

preferencesPage.title: Preferences
preferencesPage.description: Theme and language. These settings are stored locally in your browser.

theme.label: Theme
theme.description: Switches the entire app between the dark (default) and light palettes.

language.label: Language
language.description: Locale used for all interface copy. Affects this session and persists in your browser.

opsLinksPage.title: Ops links — dashboards & billing
opsLinksPage.description: Shortcuts to the external consoles used to operate the app. Every link opens in a new tab — the running session stays intact.

billing.title: Billing — every card on file
billing.description: Centralised view of the billing dashboards where a credit card is on file. Check weekly to avoid end-of-month surprises.

hosting.title: Hosting & compute (GCP)
hosting.description: Cloud Run, IAM, Secret Manager, Artifact Registry, OAuth, billing — project `trade-496613`.

database.title: Database (Supabase)
database.description: Project `portfolioai-prod` in Toronto (`ca-central-1`). Active connection mode: Session pooler IPv4.

cdn.title: DNS & CDN (Cloudflare)
cdn.description: Registrar `tickerstory.org`, Worker `tickerstory-proxy` (custom-domain proxy → Cloud Run), Cache Rules.

observability.title: Observability
observability.description: GlitchTip for errors (Sentry-compatible), UptimeRobot for external availability.

externalApis.title: External APIs (runtime keys)
externalApis.description: Providers wired through `/settings/configuration`. Key rotation lives on each vendor's console.

github.title: GitHub — `jv3n/trade`
github.description: Actions, Releases, Environments, Secrets — where the deploy pipeline runs and the repo is audited.

links.gcpBilling: Cloud Run + Artifact Registry + Secret Manager billing. Durable free tier, watch the egress quota (1 GB/mo N. America).
links.supabaseBilling: Free tier 500 MB DB + 50K MAU. Card on file to absorb an overage without downtime.
links.cloudflareBilling: Card on file for the `tickerstory.org` registrar (~$7.50/yr at-cost). R2 free tier 10 GB as long as we stay under.
links.anthropicBilling: Pay-as-you-go on Claude — token usage billed monthly. Check after an intensive analysis session.
links.tickerstoryDomain: Cloudflare custom domain (Worker proxy → Cloud Run Montréal).
links.cloudRunDirect: Raw Cloud Run URL — fallback when Cloudflare is suspected.
links.supabaseBackups: Native Supabase daily snapshots — independent from our weekly `pg_dump → R2`.
links.cloudflareWorker: Intercepts `tickerstory.org/*` and forges a `fetch()` to Cloud Run with rewritten Host header.
links.glitchtipOrg: Overview + alert rules (instant email on new issue + burst >10 events/h) + free-tier quota 5K events/mo.
links.anthropicConsole: Claude API overview — token usage + available models + key rotation.

accessControlPage.title: Access control
accessControlPage.intro: Emails allowed to complete Google sign-in. Empty = open mode: any Google account is accepted (created as USER). Once you post the first entry, gating takes effect on the next fresh sign-in.
accessControlPage.adminNote: Admin emails (APP_ADMIN_EMAILS env var) are automatically included in the effective list — no need to re-add them here.
accessControlPage.openModeNote: Open mode is active: the list is empty. Add at least one email to start gating sign-ins.
accessControlPage.emptyHint: No emails in the list. Open mode is active — use the field below to add the first.

errors.load: Could not load the access list.

promptsPage.intro: Manage the versions of the prompt body that drives the narrative pipeline. Only the persona / tone is editable ; the JSON technical contract is managed by the system and cannot be modified. The active version is used by every generation ; activating another version replaces the previous one without a reboot.
promptsPage.empty: No prompts in the database. Check that the Flyway migrations applied successfully (seed of the narrative-default prompt).
promptsPage.envelopeIntro: Appended automatically after your prompt body. Defines the JSON contract, the sentiment rule and length ceilings — not editable.
promptsPage.envelopeLoadError: Failed to load the technical envelope.

stats.title: Prompt stats
stats.intro: Aggregated metrics across every persisted narrative run for this version.
stats.empty: No run for this version yet. Generate a narrative on a ticker dossier to start collecting metrics.

latency.title: Latency p50 over 90 days
latency.notEnough: Not enough points to draw a line (at least 2 days with runs needed).

errors.load: Failed to load stats. Try again.
errors.missingId: Missing prompt id in the URL.

editor.notesPlaceholder: Why this version? What does this change address?
editor.systemPromptHelp: Sets the writer's role and tone. The JSON technical contract is appended automatically and cannot be edited here.

errors.loadList: Failed to load the prompts list.
errors.activate: Failed to activate version {{version}}. Try again.
errors.create: Failed to save the new version.

configurationPage.title: Runtime configuration
configurationPage.intro: Edit live what normally lives in application-local.yml. Changes apply without restarting the backend.
configurationPage.placeholderMasked: •••• already set — type a new value to replace it

marketProvider.title: Market provider
marketProvider.description: Switch between the local mock (deterministic, offline) and Twelve Data (live, requires the API key below). Takes effect on the next dossier load.

newsProvider.title: News provider
newsProvider.description: Switch between the local mock (synthetic feed) and Finnhub (live, requires the API key below). Takes effect on the next dossier load.

analystProvider.title: Analyst recommendations provider
analystProvider.description: Switch between the local mock (deterministic per symbol) and Finnhub (live, requires the API key below). Takes effect on the next dossier load.

earningsProvider.title: Earnings provider
earningsProvider.description: Switch between the local mock (deterministic per symbol) and Finnhub (live, requires the API key below). Takes effect on the next dossier load.

screenerProvider.title: Market radar provider
screenerProvider.description: Switch between the local mock (deterministic synthetic snapshot), Polygon (grouped-daily endpoint, requires a Polygon Stocks Basic+ subscription — Basic free no longer covers it post-2026 rebrand), and FMP (top gainers/losers, free tier 250 req/day — no volume signal, the radar's volume floor is auto-bypassed for FMP movers). Takes effect on the next radar refresh.

llmProvider.title: LLM provider
llmProvider.description: Picks the engine that writes the ticker dossier narrative: Claude (Anthropic cloud, requires anthropic.api.key in application-local.yml) or Ollama (local, requires an Ollama daemon listening). The switch takes effect on the next analysis.

ollamaStatus.title: Ollama status
ollamaStatus.noLoadedModels: No model currently held in VRAM. The first call pulls the model and keeps it loaded until the idle timeout (Ollama default: 5 min).
ollamaStatus.noAvailableModels: No model pulled locally. Run `ollama pull <tag>` (or the Tilt button) before pointing a model here.
ollamaStatus.notApplicableForClaude: Ollama status not applicable to the Claude provider — use the “Tester” button on the “Claude model” card below to validate Anthropic connectivity.

pullDialog.title: Pull an Ollama model
pullDialog.hint: Type the tag of the model to download (e.g. mistral:7b) or pick a suggestion. The download blocks 1–3 minutes depending on size — keep the dialog open.

providerDisabled.missingKey: Configure the `{{ key }}` key first to enable this provider.

twelveData.title: Twelve Data — API key
twelveData.description: Market data provider (quotes, OHLC, indicators). Free tier 800 credits/day. Get an API key.
twelveData.sectorHint: Heads-up: the Sector benchmark on the ticker dossier uses Finnhub even when Twelve Data is the market provider. Set the Finnhub key below as well to keep that toggle working.

finnhub.title: Finnhub — API key
finnhub.description: Provider for the news section on the ticker dossier. Free tier 60 calls/min. Get an API key.

polygon.title: Polygon (Massive) — API key
polygon.description: Provider for the market radar (Phase 6). Post-2026 rebrand the free Basic tier only includes /v3/reference/... — the grouped-daily endpoint our adapter calls requires Stocks Basic+ (paid). Polygon rebranded as Massive in 2026 — the API base moved to api.massive.com. Get an API key.

fmp.title: FMP (Financial Modeling Prep) — API key
fmp.description: Provider for the market radar (Phase 6). Free tier 250 req/day, no credit card required. The radar calls /stable/biggest-gainers + /biggest-losers (top 50 each = ~100 movers per refresh ; the legacy /api/v3/stock_market/* paths were deprecated August 2025). No volume signal on this endpoint — FMP movers carry volumeRatio = 0 as a sentinel and bypass the radar's volume floor automatically. Get an API key.

anthropicKey.title: Anthropic — API key
anthropicKey.description: Key used by the Claude LLM provider for every ticker narrative. Hot-swappable — the new value is read on the next call without a reboot. Get or rotate a key.

ollamaModel.title: Ollama — model
ollamaModel.description: Tag of the model used when the LLM provider is Ollama (e.g. qwen2.5:3b, llama3.2:3b). The model must be pulled locally (`ollama pull <tag>`). The Test button sends a short prompt and measures latency.

claudeModel.title: Claude — model
claudeModel.description: Identifier of the model used when the LLM provider is Claude (e.g. claude-opus-4-6, claude-sonnet-4-5). The Test button validates that the model responds with the Anthropic key currently configured above.

llmTimeout.title: LLM timeout
llmTimeout.description: Maximum duration for an LLM call before giving up — covers the HTTP read timeout backend-side (Ollama), the frontend polling window, and the job dedup window. Push it when testing a heavy Ollama model with a long cold-start ; lower it to fail faster while debugging.

cacheTtl.title: Market & news cache — TTL
cacheTtl.description: How long Twelve Data and Finnhub responses are cached (Caffeine). Shorter = fresher data but more API calls.

observabilityPage.title: Narrative observability
observabilityPage.intro: Past narratives on this ticker, paired with what the price did since. Scroll to inspect; click a card to expand the full summary.
observabilityPage.empty: No narrative has been generated for {{symbol}} yet. Open the dossier and run an analysis to populate the history.
observabilityPage.filteredEmpty: No narrative matches the current filters.
observabilityPage.pricesUnavailable: Price action is currently unavailable (the chart upstream failed). Narratives are shown without delta columns.

errors.load: Failed to load the timeline. Try again.

observabilityIndexPage.title: Narrative observability — index
observabilityIndexPage.intro: Tickers with at least one persisted narrative. Pick one to open its timeline of past narratives paired with subsequent price action.
observabilityIndexPage.empty: No narrative has been generated yet. Open a dossier and run an analysis to populate the history.

errors.load: Failed to load the ticker index. Try again.

biasPage.title: Bias dashboard
biasPage.intro: Aggregate view of the narrative corpus: sentiment distribution, sentiment-vs-price calibration, topic coverage, user votes. Filter by prompt version to compare one prompt against another.
biasPage.empty: No narrative in the corpus for the active filter. Widen the window, or wait until ~50 snapshots have accumulated before aggregates become meaningful.

calibration.title: Sentiment vs price calibration
calibration.hint: Average delta after the narrative. BULLISH should trend positive, BEARISH negative.

topics.title: Topic coverage (top 15)
topics.hint: Most-mentioned tokens in the key_points. Absence of an expected topic (e.g. volatility) is itself a signal.
topics.empty: No significant tokens extracted from the corpus.

thumbs.title: User votes by sentiment
thumbs.hint: If you systematically thumb-up BULLISH and thumb-down BEARISH, that's a bias too — on the human side.
thumbs.aria: {{sentiment}}: {{up}} thumbs up, {{neutral}} neutral, {{down}} thumbs down, {{novote}} with no vote

errors.load: Failed to load the aggregates. Try again.

radar.title: Market radar
radar.subtitle: Gap-up small-caps screened against the machine-checkable GUS criteria (price $1–$10, gap ≥ +50 %). Float and dilution to be checked on DilutionTracker. An investigation signal, not a recommendation.
radar.notYetFetched: No snapshot yet. Press « Search » to query the provider.
radar.empty: No ticker clears the GUS checklist in the latest snapshot.

errors.fetch: Could not load the radar snapshot. Please retry.
errors.refresh: The provider rejected the refresh. It may be rate-limited or down — please retry.

addStat.error: Couldn't add {{ticker}} to stats. Please retry.

dialog.title: Add to stats?
dialog.message: Create a stats row for {{ticker}} (gap {{gap}} %, open ${{price}}).
dialog.hint: Float, institutions and the high/LOD/EOD levels stay empty — fill them in at end of day.

journalIo.title: Import / Export
journalIo.subtitle: Move your journal in and out as CSV.

export.title: Export
export.subtitle: Download every trade
export.description: Get a CSV snapshot of every trade in your journal. The format is roundtrip-safe with the upcoming importer — every input field on a trade is preserved.

format.columns: 19 columns matching the trade input schema.
format.roundtrip: Can be re-imported as-is when the import flow ships.

export.error: Export failed. Please retry in a moment.

import.title: Import
import.subtitle: Restore from a CSV
import.description: Drop a CSV exported from this page (or hand-edited following the same column layout). Atomic batch — if any row is invalid, no trade is persisted and you get a per-line error report below.
import.hint: .csv only — single file, no batch yet.
import.failed: {{ count }} error(s) found — nothing was imported.
